rulings.Case Title: KIMO KEAWE ET AL VS. CELIA BONFIGLIO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment On Plaintiffs' Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2020, line 1, DEFENDANT CELIA BONFIGLIO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment On Plaintiffs' Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR BERMUDEZ ET AL VS. CHRISTINE N. MUHAWIEH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2020, line 2, DEFENDANT CHRISTINE MUHAWIEH, ISA MUHAWIEH's DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the cause of action for violation of the Rent Ordinance and UCL violation based on the violation of the Rent Ordinance. The operative complaint alleges that the landlords improperly recovered possession and re-rented the unit to a third party before the effective date of the SFRO amendment. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that under these facts Plaintiff still has a viable tenancy. In fact, Plaintiff alleges that their tenancy has been improperly terminated and possessory rights given to third parties in 2019. Aguirre v. Lee (1993) 20 Cal. App. 4th1646 is factually distinguishable. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OASIS GRILL, LLC ET AL VS. ERIC KETCHUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance Of Deposition Subpoena For Business Records By Amana Engineering And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2020, line 3, DEFENDANT ERIC KETCHUM's Motion To Compel Compliance Of Deposition Subpoena For Business Records By Amana Engineering And For Sanctions. OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for January 11, 2021. January 11, 2021 hearing is transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BUILD GROUP, INC. VS. 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: 1. Notice Of Motion And Motion For The Following Orders: (1) To Order The Mechanics Lien Of Build Group, Inc. Be Reduced To $17,872,765.60; And (2) To Release The Subject Property From The Defective Mechanics Lien Of Van-Mulder Sheet Metal, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2020, line 4, DEFENDANT 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING, LLC, 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING LP 1. Notice Of Motion And Motion For The Following Orders: (1) To Order The Mechanics Lien Of Build Group, Inc. Be Reduced To $17,872,765.60; And (2) To Release The Subject Property From The Defective Mechanics Lien Of Van-Mulder Sheet Metal, Inc. DENIED. Moving party failed to establish that Van-Mulder's lien is invalid and failed to cite authority for the proposition that Plaintiff's lien shall be reduced in any amount at this time. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IDA IBARRA VS. NANCY AYALA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2020, line 5. DEFENDANT NANCY AYALA, ILIAN AYALA, DANIEL HERNANDEZ, BRITTANY RODRIGUEZ, JOSE AYALA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for ejectment. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ABIGAIL BLOOMKING VS. JAMIL MALIK BEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2020, line 6. DEFENDANT MARIMAR CORNEJO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Proof of service of the moving papers must be filed no later than five court days before the time appointed for the hearing. CRC 3.1300. Purported Proof of service (not executed under the penalty of perjury) was submitted for filing one court day before the hearing on December 21, 2020. =(501/REQ)
